items.name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M83225 Pink] The Louis Vuitton classic Monogram pattern appears on soft Monogram Empreinte leather, making the iconic Zippy wallet stand out. Fully zippered with exquisite lining, its compact design is highly functional. Can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W) C

items.name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M11777 Gold Buckle] This Louis Vuitton classic Sarah wallet is made from two-tone Monogram Empreinte leather, exuding an elegant style. Adorned with the signature Monogram embossed pattern, the envelope-style flap features a gold button. Opening the wallet reveals an organized interior with two large compartments, multiple pockets, and 16 card slots. 19 x 10.5 x 2 cm (L x H x W) C

items.name_cn:
M83649
Made of Monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "Portefeuil Lisa" is a compact wallet featuring a coin pocket with a strap and an LV circle pull. Its size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 11.5 1.5

items.name_en: 【lv charms card holder】 m12215 Monogram Red m12227 Monogram Blue (Silk-screened - Christmas)
items.name_cn:
【lv charms card holder】 m12215 Monogram Red m12227 Monogram Blue (Silk-screened - Christmas)
This LV charms card holder is from the Candy Factory series, inviting the brand mascot to enjoy a wonderful holiday season. Monogram canvas depicts Vivienne wandering amidst colorful candies, with Vivienne styling and LV floral details.
Size: 7.3 x 0.3 x 10.2 cm

items.name_en: 【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
items.name_cn:
【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
This coin purse belongs to the Candy Factory collection, dressing the brand mascot Vivienne in festive attire and paying tribute to the colorful holiday season with delicious seasonal candies, making it a perfect collector's gift. The monogram canvas creates a compact shape, while eye-catching metal details like the key ring and Vivienne-shaped zipper complete the look.
Size: 7 x 1.5 x 12 cm

items.name_en: 【Rosalie Wallet】 m12220 Monogram Red m12239 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa)
items.name_cn:
【Rosalie Wallet】 m12220 Monogram Red m12239 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa)
This Rosalie wallet features the classic Monogram canvas from the Candy Factory collection, placing the brand mascot inside a heart-shaped candy cane pattern, making it a compact gift for Vivienne fans. Open the Vivienne-shaped button to reveal multiple pockets for safely storing coins, bills, and cards.
Size: 8 x 2.5 x 11 cm
